uncovered_waiver.reason: OMN-14818 hand-flips node_auth_gate_compute to canonical def-B via a PURE RENAME evaluate->handle (OMN-14781 path): the 10-step authorization cascade body is preserved byte-identically and the business-logic helpers (_is_whitelisted_path/_glob_to_regex/_path_matches_globs) are re-derived byte-identical base_ref<->HEAD by the ratchet from git. Equivalence is proven by that git-verbatim preservation plus the green runtime-dispatch parity tests and the golden-equivalence replay over the selected input corpus, not by a broad branch-coverage claim over the legacy handler body; the ReDoS/depth guard branches (>2 '**' segments raising ValueError, PATH_MAX truncation) are adversarial guards covered by the existing unit suite and are not driven by the deterministic dispatch corpus.
